sql_array: INSERT INTO timestamps SELECT * FROM generate_series(TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02', INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02';
SELECT event_time, COUNT(*) FROM timestamps GROUP BY event_time ORDER BY event_time;
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02';
